name: io.github.nulib-labs/authoritex-mcp
title: Authoritex
description: Search and fetch normalized authority records from library vocabularies via AuthoritexJS.

environmentVariables.name: GEONAMES_USERNAME
environmentVariables.description: GeoNames username for geonames authority lookups.

environmentVariables.name: AUTHORITEX_CACHE_MAX_ENTRIES
environmentVariables.description: Maximum number of in-memory Authoritex cache entries.
